description: Polite decline — contact is interested but too busy, no hostility

transcript.content: Hi Sneha, this is Priya calling from Freedom with AI. How are you doing today?
Hi, I'm okay. What's this about?
I'm reaching out because we're hosting a free masterclass on AI automation for business owners this Saturday. I thought it might be valuable for you.
Saturday? No, I can't do Saturday. I have a family function.
I understand. We do run these regularly. Would you be interested in attending a future session?
Hmm, maybe. But honestly I'm quite busy these days with my new project launch. Maybe next month?
Of course, that makes sense. Should I have someone reach out to you next month when we schedule the next batch?
Yeah, you can do that. Just send me a message on WhatsApp, don't call again please.
Noted, we'll send you a WhatsApp message next month. Thanks for your time, Sneha. All the best with your project launch!
